reviews.title: Nice looking but---
reviews.text:
Just received yesterday so can't comment on accuracy yet. Got watch set up through app with no problems. Then the maddening part-One of reasons I ordered this watch was watch face on Amazon pictures. Well, I scrolled down through all the faces on the app 4 times and the shown watch face was not even there for download-What the hell!!!!! I've ordered 6 or 7 smart watches and this is the first one without magnetic charging cable. Has this plastic thingy at end of cord you have to push watch down into in order to charge. Don't like this at all. Haven't decided whether to keep or not but not off to a good start.
After a few days another problem. Battery charge on watch shows 100% all the time even after 2 days of wearing. Impossible for battery level not to go down somewhat if not a lot. Returning.

reviews.title: Cheap watch with premium features!
reviews.text:
I own several smart watches only because I like different styles. I have to say this one is very stylish and elegant. Works very well and has tons of features. The watch band feels strong and durable.

Some of the reading features such as the blood pressure monitor is not 100 percent accurate but pretty close compared to a cuff system.

Battery last a few days before needing a charge again. It’s also IP68, has music control once paired to your phone, heart rate monitor, blood oxygen readings, call & text notifications, and so much more!

If you are looking for a smart watch that would not break the bank, then this is it! Go and get yourself one of these today! It’s highly recommended!

reviews.title: Impressive watch with features
reviews.text: Watch has many features for fitness and heath I bought 2. Some of the screens are well thought out. Accuracy is a key benefit of this watch. Needed to use newer version of app and works with my android phone. Current version is metric and new version is to have imperial values. Vendor was responsive and resolved questions ASAP. Plan to buy new version with upgrades when available

reviews.title: lastima el software del celular
reviews.text:
Este reloj tiene varias cosas interesantes, pero lastimosamente el software del celular que lo controla tiene muchas fallas, por ejemplo cuando uno agrega una lista de contactos favoritos al reloj, esporadicamente desaparece y hay que volver a crearla. Tambien es frecuente que se desconecta el programa y el reloj, por lo que se dejan de recibir notificaciones en el reloj.

Tambien hay problemas con la personalizacion del skin, donde uno selecciona una foto de fondo, la descarga al reloj y aveces despues de unos minutos u horas desaparece y toca volver a hacer el proceso.

Tambien la aplicacion del celular esta mal diseñada, algunos botones no se ven bien y es dificil encontrar como seguir cuando se quiere configurar el reloj.

Lo bueno del reloj:
- permite recibir y hacer llamadas desde el reloj ya que trae microfono y un pequeño parlante, pero hay que aclarar que necesita al celular cerca y conectado por bluetooth.
- Reporta bien la mayoria de notificaciones que recive el celular, como llegada de SMS, emails, mensajes de whatsapp, aunque no muestra emojins.

-La bateria carga en 90minutos completamente y puede durar 3 dias sin tener que recargar.

En resumen hasta que el fabricante no mejore los problemas de software no es una buena compra este reloj.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement
reviews.text: Exact replacement and a fraction of the price you would pay if you bought it from the store

reviews.title: Blue is more purple
reviews.text: The blue is more purple than it is blue. The color was mostly true to its display photo though, but just a word of caution in case if anyone really wanted a true blue. As for the band itself, I can’t say much about durability since I just installed it. This band comes with 2 securing bands whereas the original Garmin comes with 1. I also feel like the band doesn’t meet flush with the watch face as well as the original Garmin but it’s not bad. This band is also a little stiffer than the floppy Garmin band, and I think I actually like the feel of this stiffer band.

reviews.title: Fits 45s perfectly
reviews.text: Worked perfectly as a replacement band for the 45s. Not sure why other reviewers are having issues because it’s great!

reviews.title: I wanted the teal specifically
reviews.text: I replaced my watch band as soon as they came and it's been on since summer with no complaints.  I appreciate the fact that they send a little screwdriver with the set, it's so helpful not having to find something that small on your own.  Nice product!

reviews.title: Glitchy smartwatch has a mind of its own
reviews.text:
I've been using this smartwatch for about five weeks. There are tons of watch faces to choose from, but I couldn't find any with just the info I wanted at a glance: time, date, steps, and weather. I found one watch face with everything but weather and loaded that, but the watch face spontaneously changes several times a day to designs I've never selected. I don't like having to reset it with my phone every few hours to get back to my preferred watch face.

It vibrates at random times and shows me (what I believe is) some sort of prompt to reset it. Sometimes it prompts me for voice commands or makes phone calls for no apparent reason. I erased my contacts, so I hope it won't accidentally wrist-dial anyone else.

It needs to be recharged every 2-3 days — not every ten days as claimed for "Bluetooth daily usage mode" — and I'm NOT using the majority of its supposed features.

I've reached out to customer support a few times, but they say I'm doing something wrong. I'm just wearing it; the glitches happen whether I'm moving or still. Support has been no help at all. I haven't been able to find information on how to make it work as advertised online either, but at least Google doesn't blame me for the faulty product.

reviews.title: Un-binds Constantly...
reviews.text: It wont update, most of the watch faces don't download correctly. It decides on it's own when to un-bind from blu tooth. The only reason i'm not returning is because it's comfortable and it tracks my steps and tells time. Literally the only things I use. However, you do not receive messages, you miss calls, and it struggles to bind to your phone. I have had to re-install the app numerous times. When i complained to the online chat. they suggested re-installing the app. That was their only answer to any questions. Doesn't seem like anyone knows really what's going on. either way, if you want to "phone/messages" part of the watch, i highly suggest shopping for a different one.

reviews.title: Face size is great for reading it without glasses
reviews.text: I like being able to see the face and read it without my glasses. I didn't turn on any of the special features like phone, pictures, messaging, etc; mainly because it's made in China, but I'm sure I'm giving away info anyway. Unlike the Fitbit, this doesn't have a way to list and track your food intake and glucose readings. I bought it inorder to read the time, steps, etc, without glasses.

reviews.title: Love this watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch with accurate steps. I love the gps feature where it shows your walk on a true map on the app. Nice visual. Heart rate is very accurate as well. Haven't used music feature as much as I thought I would. Garmin makes a nice watch. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Heart rate way off
reviews.text:
The main thing I bought this for is to monitor heart rate while hiking. Its reading is way off for me - as confirmed by a pulse ox and manually counting. The watch kept telling me my heart rate was over 100 just around the house. I have nsvt but my heart rate generally runs low. So I'm very sensitive when I have palpitations - when this watch kept saying my heart rate was over 95 I wasnt buying it. That brings into question any other readings or parameters.

I find the watch annoying and frustrating to use. The watch face does not interact very well for me. I'm constantly trying to tap it and it wont register so then the screen shuts off. Another annoying thing is it tells you to start moving around when I'm doing housework. I guess you can shut that off but I've really lost interest. Hopefully Garmin can offer some fix for the reading since its past the return date.

The positives - watch is comfortable and I don't wear jewelry. I forget its on. Its a large size so its readable if you have vision issues. I've had no problem with that.

reviews.title: Lightweight and perfect for small wrists
reviews.text: This is a great lightweight fitness tracker.  It has about a 4 day battery life and does a quick recharge.  It has a little learning curve for the activity tracking but it is right up there with my Apple Watch.

reviews.title: Exelente
reviews.text: La bateria me dura 14 dias. Pantalla se ve perfectamente bajo el sol. La app connect trabaja muy bien, en la tienda puedo descargar pantallas para el reloj. Resto de las actividades ok. Lo recomiendo

reviews.title: Large Screen-Bright White Band
reviews.text: I like everything about this except that I didn’t realize that the frame and the band would be a Brilliant white! There is a golden strip surrounding the watch face.

reviews.title: Best gift ever
reviews.text: Bought this for a 9 year old. It’s amazing. It has so many things on it and is easy to use. She shows it to everyone who will look at it and she feels like it’s just like her big brothers and sisters watches. Very happy.

reviews.title: 2G is Dead
reviews.text: This watch says that it utilizes a sim card with 2g service. This service is nearly dead everywhere. The sim card area in the watch is a little tricky to figure out. You have to open the back and then lift up the battery slightly. The sim card slot is located under the battery. You have to slide(left/right) and lift up the metal sim card cover like a door. Insert the sim card and lay the metal cover down over it and slide it into place to lock it. This watch is not waterproof. The watch works as specified except for the 2g calling. 2g service is not available in my area, so make sure you check if your area still has it. You have to buy your own sim card and they recommend Speedtalk service. Check their coverage map for 2g service.

title: Kimnix Smart Watch 2022(Make Call Receive/Dial), 1.72 in HD Full Touch Screen Fitness Tracker with Bluetooth Call/Text/Heart Rate/SpO2/Sleep Monitor Smartwatch for Android iOS Mens Women (Black)

reviews.title: Fair features for the price
reviews.text:
First of all, you must keep in consideration that this is a $50 watch. That being said I will state what I consider are the pros and cons:

Pros
Price, battery life (more than the typical 1-day of apple watches), capable of answering and dialing within the watch (Bluetooth required) and blood oxygen and heart rate sensors.

Cons
Strap does not hold to watch and you must keep correcting it (solved with another strap?), blood pressure monitor? How???, you only have five watch faces at any given time but you can only replace one of the five - the others are permanently set, you get to edit the fourth one by adding a photo

Overall, there are cheaper and better watches like the WYZE (which I own and has better quality) but lack the phone answering and dialing features.

I will be replacing the strap with another type to see if it holds.

reviews.title: It does not keep all of the apps current. That is what I bought it for.
reviews.text: I bought this watch per my doctors request to keep health issues.  I only use it for this feature.  But to my amazement, It does not do as it states.  As I use only the medical aspects only I would expect it to work perfectly.

reviews.title: Seems to work pretty well for the most part
reviews.text: Setup was easy with a quick app download and it paired with my iPhone 12 without any drama. Biometric tracking seems to work reasonably well with the exception of heart rate, which seems to always read 70 no matter what I'm doing. I'm not too crazy about the aesthetic of the watch, it just looks kind of cheap to me. I got this mainly to use as a health tracking tool and to tell time, not to make and receive calls/texts with, so I haven't setup any of those features yet and may never get around to doing so. So i can't comment on ease of use for any of those features. I did like that there are quite a lot of different watch face designs that can be applied and without any additional purchase. For the price of around $40, this is a pretty smokin' deal for a smart watch, I think.

reviews.title: Not bad for the price
reviews.text:
I’ve tried a few different affordable watches and my biggest issue has been the charging port. They have trouble staying connected with tiny pins and no magnetic pull. So going into this I’m more critical.
Upside is there is definitely a better charging system. It holds in place nicely even though it’s a pretty small pin area it is easier to charge.
The screen does have low sensitivity response. When pairing it it took 3 tries to get it recognize I had tapped the screen.
On a good note it’s reading well and has some great features like heart rate, oxygen, and sleep. Everything lined up well with my normal statistics so I feel it’s pretty accurate.
There’s a variety of images to choose from so you can customize the screen however you would like.
It’s very comfortable. The band holds like a premium watch band. It has a large face that is classy. Aesthetically it’s very nice.
Overall for an affordable smart watch it’s a decent option.

reviews.title: Okay tracker
reviews.text: For the price, it is an okay tracker.  The microphone on the watch is not of great quality as I was told sounded muffled on it.  It does have a lot of features and was quite easy to use but nothing about it made it stand out from the other hundreds of smart watches out on the market.

reviews.title: Cute watch is all I can say
reviews.text: Initially the watch was quick to charge and holds the charge for a couple of days.  The functions were easy to use, and a lot to choose from for the activities I do.  I mainly track my steps, distance, duration, heart rate.  It worked well for a few weeks, then I took it swimming for a few laps in the pool.  That was a mistake, battery stopped working (won't charge anymore).  Sad, I really liked the watch, it's cute but the battery died.

reviews.title: Great Smart watch for the essentials
reviews.text:
I was looking for a good smart watch for my mother. She was a Fitbit user but her Fitbit died after years of use and wanted something with a similar feel.
This watch really worked out for her.
It's got a great screen and a good amount of apps to provide essential uses.
It's able to work with iOS and Android.
It's able to get notifications from apps and make phone calls.
Not a bad product at all.

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

title: AGPTEK Smart Watch for Women, Smartwatch for Android and iOS Phones IP68 Waterproof Activity Tracker with Full Touch Color Screen Heart Rate Monitor Pedometer Sleep Monitor, Pink
features: 【Your Watch, Your Style】1.3"/33mm touch screen covered with rose gold metal frame, so elegant and nice, but sturdy and anti-scratch. The smart watch contains 5 dials readily available to choose from along with another 30 more dials within the app. You can also customize your watch faces. It can be any photo, such as your family, pet ,etc. NOTE: When there is a software update prompt on the APP, it is recommended to upgrade to the latest software version for a better experience!

【Your Personal Smart Assistant】Activity tracker (pedometer, calories, distance), heart rate, various sport modes, sleep monitoring.,etc. Get notifications of Call, SMS, and APP messages(THE WATCH CAN NOT MAKE MESSAGES, CALLS or TEXT BACK, Bluetooth distance 8-10 meters), remote control of music and cameras, weather report, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, find phone, call rejection, brightness adjustment, power-saving mode, and other functions to meet your daily needs.

【Long Battery & IP68 Waterproof】The smartwatch only takes 2 hours to charge and can be used for 7-10 days or 30 days standby time, much longer than most traditional watches. The fitness watch is IP68 waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain(Note: Do Not use in water more than 100. 40℉, such as showers, saunas, spring, etc).

【Safe Guard Your Health】Advanced HR sensor for accurate and effective heart rate monitoring, helping you better understand your health and making a reasonable adjustment to your lifestyle. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status (deep sleep, shallow sleep, awakening) and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis to help become healthier. You can view the summary of your status in the fitcloudpro APP.

【Overtake Your Expectations】The AGPTEK smart watch is compatible with most iOS 9.0 & Android 5.0 or higher smart phones version to notify you of call, text, email, calendar, and app notifications(NOTE: Bluetooth connection is 8-10m). The package includes:AGPTEK Smart Watch*1, Watch Strap*1, Magnetic Charger*1,User Manual*1. If your have any problem, please feel free to contact our customer service via your amazon account.

reviews.title: Very limited life span
reviews.text: Too costly for what is now a disposable watch.  Within about 3 months the watch started randomly sending two vibrating signals like it was trying to make a notification of some sort.  Second vibration came with a short screen request to shut down the watch.  Side button quit working after about a month but was not an issue.  Still kept accurate time, fairly good step counts, and notifications of incoming texts and phone calls.  Just can’t stand the frequent and random vibrating. Unlike other commenters my watches battery life was very good.

reviews.title: It stopped for no reason twice
reviews.text: I am returning the first one that I got because I think perhaps there may be a flaw in it because for no reason at all it just shut itself off or wouldn't show me any information on the watch and it did that to me twice so when it happened again today the second time I decided I'm returning it and requesting a replacement if it happens with the replacement then I'm getting my refund. I don't like sleeping with it on it's uncomfortable not used to sleeping with any kind of jewelry I did use it a few days and checked my sleep and it seemed to give me the same answer every time so I don't know if that's very accurate either? I realize these gadgets are not accurate however I'm just trying to find a way to motivate myself to move around more and I refuse to pay over $100 for one of these smart watches so I got this one on a lightning deal.

reviews.title: not as advertised
reviews.text:
the watch face does not come on when you raise your arm or turn or flick your wrist. this is a major problem if you assistive devices for walking.
the advertised picture is not available as a watchface when setting up the watch.
this watch is very heavy.
the band is inflexible plastic, not silicone-like at all.

this product is going back.

reviews.title: Not impressed--clock always switches to between modes--walking mode never stayed on not reliable
reviews.text: i made a mistake choosing this product switching between screens never tracked sleep,walking,sports and exercise time

reviews.title: Easy to sync, love this watch
reviews.text: I just received this watch today. So easy to set up. My Samsung S2 would not keep a charge despite everything I did. So I started searching for a new smart watch. I read many, many reviews on this watch. The price was phenomenal  so I thought I would try it! So far its just what I wanted. Easy, stylish. I bought the black one, but switched out bands to a turquoise one. So happy with it!

title: Maledan Band Compatible with Fitbit Sense/ Versa 3 Bands Women Men, Adjustable Stretchy Nylon Solo Loop Braided Sport Elastics Strap for Fitbit Sense Bands/ Versa 3 Smartwatch Bands
features: 【Compatible Model】Maledan elastic nylon bands are compatible with Fitbit Sense/ Versa 3/ Versa 4/ Sense 2 Watch. Suitable for wrist 5.9" to 9.8" (150mm to 230mm). We provide the service and will help you solve the problem within 24 hours
【Adjustment Freely】Stretch wrist for Fitbit Sense/ Sense 2 bands/ Versa 3/4 bands with stainless steel loop buckle, you can adjust the tightness you desire which makes you feel like wearing nothing

【Breathable Material】Maledan sport band is made of premium elastic nylon. The stretchy nylon materials make the band easy to switch out. Breathable, Durable, and Lightweight design make sure you exercise or work without feeling constriction

【Washable & No Irritation】The smartwatch band is breathable and washable without skin reacting like metal bands and will not leave indents or sweat. So you can wear it day and night. It can accurately record your heart rate, sleep, and exercises
【Fashion Colors & Styles】 These Elastic bands provide different fashion styles and colors. Getting a new band, adjust your watch to your mood and your outfit then change your looks in everyday life

reviews.title: extremely comfortable
reviews.text: I was looking for a replacement band because the plastic band that came with the watch was causing me to develop a minor rash under the band.  (I suspect this was due to the moisture trapped under the band after hand washing.) At any rate, the band allows the watch to be moved out of the way, while hand washing. The band is also very comfortable. Changing the band was very easy to change out.

reviews.title: Great band for Versa 3
reviews.text: I have used different types with my previous Fibit watches. These are by far the most comfortable. So glad I tried them.

reviews.title: Good, comfy bands for the Sense
reviews.text: So far I really like these. They are comfy and cheap.

reviews.title: I love these bands… much easier than a buckle type.
reviews.text: These bands are easy to install, easy to wear, and look good.

reviews.title: Great replacement band.
reviews.text: The band is great for larger wrists.  It is comfortable and I have received complements on the design . Now i do not have to deal with the band irritating my skin.  Great price.

title: VEAQEE Compatible Alta Ace Nylon Bands, Soft Nylon Breathable Sport Wristbands for Women Man Kids Quick Release Replacement Wristband Accessories for Ace Alta HR Fitness Tracker
features: 【Skin-friendly materials】VEAQEE Ace/Alta HR/Alta bands made from Premium breathable , elastic woven nylon, with the features of lightweight, non-irritating to the skin.

【Good quality】 Fashion appearance, easy installment and washable and quick drying material which is perfectly designed for children and woman’s no worry about the problems of getting dirty and falling off easily.
【Color&size】Multi-color can be choose,5.51-7.8 inch length,skin friendly material cater to different children need.

【Convenient】Powerful Nylon fastenerdesign instead of buckle lock.It is really easy for children and woman to wear and install it, by adjusting the length of the band that can fit firmly to your wrist.
【Comfortable to wear】 Not feel uncomfortable when they are sweating as well as doing exercise, walking, playing or sleeping or anything else activities.

reviews.title: Most comfortable Fitbit band I've found( and I've tried many)
reviews.text: As other reviews say, this band is very comfortable. I  hate the feeling of dampness from plastic bands. This one is flexible and breathable. I have a small wrist and Velcro let's me adjust easily. I wish I could get other colors, as I do not like black or white colors, but for around the house or yard work this band is fine.

I have a small wrist and Velcro let's me adjust easily. I wish I could get other colors, as I do not like black or white colors, but for around the house or yard work this band is fine.

reviews.title: Very cute !!!!
reviews.text: Like very much that’s why I have bought 2 more.

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.text: This is a really nice band. It's narrow and closes with velcro. I got the navy (my favorite color) and so far it's my favorite band. I'm probably going to order more.

reviews.title: Very lightweight
reviews.text:
Pros: lightweight, easy to adjust, does not stick to grocery carts like the magnetic ones.
Con: if it gets into anything messy, as in the kitchen, it needs to be cleaned right away. It doesn’t just wipe off; it needs to be washed.

title: UHOOFIT Smart Watch with Text and Call, 1.8” Full Touch Screen Fitness Tracker with AI Voice Bluetooth Watch with 120+ Sport Modes for Men Women Compatible Android iOS
features: Smart Watch for Women with Text and Call, Fitness Tracker, Exercise Record, Sleep Monitor, Heart Rate, Blood Oxygen
Phone Smart Watch Answer/Make Calls, Fitness Watch with AI Control Call/Text, Android Smart Watch for iPhone Compatible, Full Touch Smartwatch for Women Men, Heart Rate/Sleep Monitor Watch.

Major function:1.8-inch large screen display, Bluetooth calling, full-screen touch, high-definition fonts, rotary keys,Exercise record (step counting, distance, calorie calculation), exercise mode, message push, information storage, sleep monitoring, heart rate measurement, stopwatch, photo control, music playback, full-character language, true blood oxygen measurement.
Appearance size Body: plastic + zinc alloy;Wristband: Silicone + Stainless Steel;
Wristband size:Total length 255MM, adjustable length 155-235MM.
